---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Fail2Ban-Report
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

Please provide a clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you are facing. For example, what frustrates you or what is missing?

## 🎯 Describe the solution you'd like

Explain clearly what new feature or improvement you would like to see in Fail2Ban-Report. How would this help you or improve the tool?

## 🔄 Describe alternatives you've considered

If applicable, mention any alternative approaches or workarounds you have tried or considered.

## 📝 Additional context

Feel free to add any other context, examples, or screenshots that help explain your request.
